reasoning: Multiple highly authoritative sources (BBC, Variety, ESPN, IGN, Euronews) have reported up to the knowledge cutoff of November 9, 2025, that Rockstar Games and Take-Two have officially delayed the release of 'Grand Theft Auto VI' twice. Second, on November 6, 2025, during an earnings call, Take-Two announced a further delay to November 19, 2026. I am setting the probability to the lowest allowable limit.
